arts.ttl: AC Milan are weighing up a January loan move for Marcus Rashford - with wantaway Manchester United forward's name thrown forward to Italian giants' chief Zlatan Ibrahimovic amid their frontline injury issues
arts.sum: The striker, who has been out of favour under Ruben Amorim and missed the midweek defeat to Newcastle through illness, is ready for a new challenge and is available this month.

arts.ttl: Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION
arts.sum: The January transfer window might not have produced a big deal yet, but there’s no shortage of drama, with Liverpool, Manchester United, Barcelona and Chelsea at the heart of matters. Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION – FootballTransfers Recap

arts.ttl: Liverpool offer Alexander-Arnold £78m deal - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool offer Trent Alexander-Arnold a £78m contract, Paris St-Germain want Aston Villa's Jhon Duran, Napoli are negotiating a loan move for Federico Chiesa, plus more.

arts.ttl: Real Betis in ‘advanced talks’ over deal for Liverpool youngster

arts.ttl: Liverpool's stance on Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk after Trent Alexander-Arnold contract offer
arts.sum: Liverpool are unsure whether or not a lucrative five-year contract offer will be enough to keep Trent Alexander-Arnold as they also fight to keep hold of Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate decision made as £60m player returns: Liverpool predicted XI v Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Liverpool - Premier League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up against Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'offer' Trent Alexander-Arnold mega contract to fend off Real Madrid - report suggests
arts.sum: Liverpool have offered Trent Alexander-Arnold a new five year contract worth up to £78 million to try and stop the defender leaving for Real Madrid on a free transfer, according to reports

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'have got to go on a Man City type run' to win the Premier League, Jamie Redknapp insists - as pundit criticises Gunners for failing to put pressure on Liverpool in Brighton draw
arts.sum: Arsenal dropped more points against the Seagulls on Saturday night as they drew 1-1 Amex, with Ethan Nwaneri's second Premier League goal in vein as Joao Pedro netted a late equaliser.
